Presenting a rare opportunity to own a slice of luxury in the esteemed Mahadev Platinum, located in the coveted neighborhood of Punitnagar Ghodasar. resultList.dtldesc: Own this marvellous and swanky 4 BHK apartment in Arihant Aura, Ambawadi, Ahmedabad. Constructed with intellectual planning and start of art interior designs, this architectural marvel is one of its kind. Superb location, spacious rooms and excellent pricing are key highlights of this property, which makes it worthwhile. Property Specifications With a carpet area of 2000 sqft, this apartment is positioned on the 2nd floor of a 7-storey tower. Offering space, luxury and the life of your dreams, this apartment is simply class apart. Featuring large balconies and windows, this condo is bathed in superb ventilation and sunlight, providing a fresh, bright and pleasant living ambience. Further, it faces east and is designed in compliance with the Vaastu rules to promote financial prosperity and harmony. The apartment is fully furnished with all the essentials that you may desire and require in a home. The flat features 4 inviting bedrooms with attached bathrooms, a common bathroom, 2 airy balconies, a welcoming living, dining area and a sleek modular kitchen. In addition, there is a servants room, a pooja room and a store room.The modern, chic bathrooms are installed with geysers whereas the modular kitchen is fitted with a chimney, piped gas connection and utility area. Opening onto the road views, one balcony is linked to the hall and the other to the dining room. Moreover, this abode is further beautified with seamless vitrified flooring.FacilitiesAmenities available for your comfort are covered parking, open parking, round the clock water supply, 100 power backup, security guards, CCTV cameras, 2 lifts and an intercom facility. LocalityThe neighbourhood is surrounded by multiple options for schools, hospitals, shopping marts, banks, ATMs and more, all accessible within 2-3min walking distance. Commuting to and from this area is trouble-free as all the modes of transportation are accessible within a short distance. The railway station is accessible within 11-12km whereas the metro station is just within 1km.
